## Category

## Product Brief
1. Anchore provides an enterprise container security and software supply chain management platform.
2. Their core technology includes SBOM generation, vulnerability scanning, and policy enforcement for containerized applications.
3. They offer comprehensive visibility and control over containerized application security, utilized by Fortune 500 companies and government agencies.
